data.title: AVAX aims for $12 by May 15 with whales buying big. 69% long positions and 8.32% surge in open interest. Technicals suggest $12+ in 4 weeks.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AVAX has surpassed a crucial resistance level as smart investors are holding 69% long positions, and the open interest has spiked by 8.32% overnight. Technical analysis indicates a potential rise to over $12 in the next four weeks as the token breaks out of its consolidation phase.

data.title: API3 price crashes below $0.30, 22% drop hints at further decline. Potential drop to $0.28 support, with chances of hitting $0.23 in 48 hours.
data.description: API3 suffered a severe 22% daily decline, indicating a high likelihood of reaching the $0.28 support level within the next 48 hours. Market experts estimate a 70% chance of this scenario unfolding. Analysis of smart money indicates potential further drop to $0.23 before any significant recovery.

data.title: PROM corrects by $1.50 on RSI of 80 and negative funding rates, possibly hitting $1.50 in 7 days amid institutional retreat.
data.description: The ongoing surge in PROM's value comes to a halt as it reaches overbought status, indicated by a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 80. Additionally, negative funding rates suggest institutional investors are pulling back. Technical analysis shows a potential drop to $1.50 within the next week as investors capitalize on profits.

data.title: BIO Token aims for $0.04 mark, consolidating at $0.03; technical setup signals potential uptrend in 14 days.
data.description: BIO is currently stabilizing around a support level of $0.03, with indicators showing momentum that could lead to a breakthrough towards a resistance level of $0.04. The current technical analysis indicates a potential upward trend in the next two weeks. However, there is a risk of a downturn if the support level is not maintained.

data.title: LINK price surges to $10.50+, whales buy during consolidation. Institutional interest increases, breakout to $11.00 expected within three weeks.
data.description: The technical compression of LINK at $9.29, along with increasing institutional interest, indicates a potential breakout above the $9.60 resistance level. Analysts predict a target range of $10.50 to $11.00 within the next three weeks.

data.title: ZRO likely to test $1.40 amid crumbling institutional narrative and oversold indicators before aiming for $2.00.
data.description: The technical foundation of ZRO is deteriorating despite excitement surrounding partnerships, as oversold signals suggest a potential retest of $1.40 before a significant rebound towards the $2.00 mark.

data.title: ADA could see a breakout to $0.28 with a potential 12% increase within two weeks due to coordinated whale accumulation.
data.description: Cardano has experienced a consolidation phase at a price of $0.25, indicating a potential increase of 12% to reach $0.28 in the upcoming two weeks. This movement is supported by coordinated buying from large investors and oversold market conditions, which may initiate the first significant surge in the near future.

data.title: PHB surges to $0.20, then drops 30% to $0.11 due to overbought conditions. Bull run hits resistance at $0.20-0.22.
data.description: The momentum of PHB drives its value up to the resistance level of $0.20-$0.22 in a matter of days. However, due to overbought technical indicators, a significant drop is expected, potentially reaching the support level of $0.11.

data.title: SUI aims for $1.20 breakout with 71% long positioning as it trades at $0.97, shows 10% derivatives interest spike.
data.description: Currently, SUI is being traded above all short-term moving averages at a rate of $0.97. Derivatives indicate a 10% increase in open interest, along with significant institutional long positioning. Notably, there is a 37% decrease in value compared to the 200-day moving average.

data.title: MOVE Token's $0.015 price collapse looms due to 11% pump...Negative funding rates and 32% drop in open interest signal trouble.
data.description: A recent sharp increase of 11% in MOVE has concealed a concerning weakness in the market. Negative funding rates are causing significant losses for long positions, with open interest plummeting by 32%. This temporary surge is expected to reverse course in the next 48 hours, potentially dropping towards $0.015.

data.title: Google, Marvell In AI Chip Talks As Nvidia Competition Heats Up
data.description: Reportedly, Google is discussing the production of updated versions of its AI chips, known as TPUs, with Marvell. This collaboration comes at a crucial time as sales of AI chips are on the rise and could potentially have a positive impact on Google's stock value. The competition with Nvidia in the AI chip market is intensifying, making this potential partnership between Google and Marvell a significant development that investors are closely monitoring.
Weekend Round-Up: Binance Rivals Major Exchanges, Bitcoin's Million-Dollar Potential And More

data.title: Dogecoin, Shiba Inu Holders Move Over $300M From Robinhood: What Do They Know?
data.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) and Shiba Inu (SHIB) have experienced notable price increases in the past month, with DOGE rising by 7% and SHIB by 6%. This surge in prices is attributed to a positive shift in overall market sentiment and significant movements of tokens from exchanges by large holders. Data from Whale Alert revealed that both DOGE and SHIB saw substantial transfers from Robinhood to private wallets, indicating a decrease in immediate selling pressure. Specifically, Dogecoin holders moved more than 2.56 billion DOGE, equivalent to about $245 million, in five transactions, marking one of the largest liquidity withdrawals in DOGE's history in a single day. Additionally, Shiba Inu holders transferred over 16 trillion SHIB tokens. These developments signify a bullish trend for both cryptocurrencies amidst growing investor interest.

data.title: Eli Lilly's Pill Lags Novo Nordisk's In First Week. Why Stock Rallied.
data.description: Analysts reported that Eli Lilly's new oral weight-loss medication, Foundayo, garnered 1,390 prescriptions during its initial week of availability. This falls short compared to Novo Nordisk's equivalent product. Despite this, Eli Lilly's stock saw a significant rally.

data.title: Bitcoin skyrockets over $77,000 and stocks hit record highs after Iran declares Strait of Hormuz open during ceasefire.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin surged to over $77,000 while stock indices achieved record levels. This rise came after news that the Strait of Hormuz in Iran is accessible due to a ceasefire.
Iran Declares Strait Of Hormuz Open To All Vessels: Crude Plunges 14%, Airlines And Cruise Stocks Soar

data.title: Payward, parent company of Kraken, to acquire Bitnomial for $550M, granting access to CFTC-licensed crypto derivatives in the U.S.
data.description: Kraken's recent acquisition will provide the company with access to a fully licensed crypto derivatives infrastructure in the United States. This move will strengthen Kraken's position in the market and expand its offerings to customers.

data.title: ZEC's at $330 facing crucial juncture: breakout to $350+ or crash to $300? 72 hours crucial for outcome.
data.description: Trading at $330, Zcash is currently in a precarious neutral zone as institutional investors are preparing for potential volatility. The next 72 hours are crucial as they will determine if ZEC surpasses resistance levels to reach $350 or experiences a drop to $300 support.

data.title: ORDI aims for $2.80 as Death Cross forms, bulls must act in 72 hours. 20% crash reveals $5.00 must be reclaimed by Thursday to avoid further decline.
data.description: A recent decline of 20% in ORDI reveals the vulnerability of the previously strong market trend. Technical analysis foresees a potential further drop to $2.80 within the next week if buyers fail to push the price back above $5.00 by Thursday.

data.title: TRX near $0.34 resistance, correction to $0.30 likely in next 2 weeks as TRON seeks breakout.
data.description: TRON's price is nearing a crucial resistance level at around $0.34 following a series of recent gains. Technical analysis points towards a potential retracement to the $0.30 support level before any significant breakout is expected.
